title: tetragonia rosea
intro: Tetragonia rosea, also known as New Zealand spinach or kōka, is a succulent plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its edible leaves and vibrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Tetragonia rosea include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Tetragonia rosea include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and diabetes, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Tetragonia rosea can be prepared as a herbal infusion, juice, or cooked as a leafy green, and is often used in traditional medicine and modern health supplements.
